meta.title: Estate — Luxury Real Estate

hero.badge: A premium gateway to extraordinary homes
hero.headline: Find Your Perfect Place To Call Home
hero.subtitle: Bright. Modern. Luxurious. A calm, glass-first experience inspired by Apple-level polish—built to make exploration feel effortless.

why.title: Luxury service, without the noise
why.subtitle: A brand experience designed to feel warm, modern, and exceptionally refined.
why.trustDesc: We curate with discretion—an experience designed to feel calm, confident, and premium.
why.verifiedDesc: Quality-first validation, so every listing meets a standard worthy of your time.
why.supportDesc: Guidance across viewings, negotiation, and next steps—with clarity at every stage.
why.secureDesc: A transparent process with secure handling and careful attention to the details.

stats.title: Measured in trust
stats.subtitle: Numbers that reflect long-term relationships, not short-term clicks.

process.title: A refined path to your next home
process.subtitle: Four steps—simple, professional, and designed for momentum.

process.visitDesc: Schedule viewings that respect your time.
process.decideDesc: Compare details, support, and next steps.
process.moveInDesc: Close smoothly and begin your next chapter.

testimonials.subtitle: A quiet confidence—built for people making meaningful decisions.
